betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Chemical Plant§f

§aMulti-fluid processor for chemical synthesis, acid production, and compound crafting.§f

§6Crafting§f (at Assembly Factory):
§b• Assembly Machine§f
§b• Steel Ingot ×8, Copper Pipe ×2§f
§b• Insulator ×16, Motor ×2§f
§b• Heating Coil ×2, Analog Circuit Board§f

Check JEI for the exact recipe.

§6Operation§f:
3 fluid inputs (24,000 mB each), 3 item slots. Select a chemistry template in the GUI, then power + feed materials.

§6Blueprint Recipes§f (need the template in blueprint slot):
§b• Nitric Acid from Air§f
§b• Stone§f (synthesized)
§b• Xenon Gas (Cooled)§f
§b• Instant Electrodes§f
§b• Engine Lubricant from Creosote§f

§6Common Uses§f:
§b• Solid Fuel§f: Infernal Coal + H₂O₂
§b• Oil/Gas processing§f: various refining steps
§b• Acid production§f: for ore processing

§eTip§f: Pipe fluids in directly. The Chemical Plant is your gateway to automated fluid processing — build it before scaling up oil or ore refining.
